# Function reference {.doc .doc-index}

## Core Modules

Modules for data loading and UI components

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [shared](shared.qmd#app.shared) |  |
| [components](components.qmd#app.components) |  |
| [icons](icons.qmd#app.icons) |  |

## Server Logic

Backend server modules for the dashboard.

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [server.server_v5](server.server_v5.qmd#app.server.server_v5) |  |

## UI Components

Frontend interface and layout modules.

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [ui.sidebar](ui.sidebar.qmd#app.ui.sidebar) |  |
| [ui.welcome](ui.welcome.qmd#app.ui.welcome) |  |
| [ui.methods](ui.methods.qmd#app.ui.methods) |  |
| [ui.landbirds_v4](ui.landbirds_v4.qmd#app.ui.landbirds_v4) |  |
| [ui.landbirds_v5](ui.landbirds_v5.qmd#app.ui.landbirds_v5) |  |
| [ui.model_access](ui.model_access.qmd#app.ui.model_access) |  |
